name: Sourdough Pancakes #5
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Add milk and starter to the beaten eggs.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
4. Mix the sifted ingredients into the egg mixture.
5. Drop the batter onto a hot griddle using large spoonfuls.
NOTE:
If an ungreased griddle is used, add 1/4 cup melted fat to the recipe. Bacon fat enhances the flavor.
